content: [Phase 1] Create Aperture module directory structure and copy Aperture source files for reference
[Phase 2] Implement .mbox file parsing logic and email data structures in vanilla JS
[Phase 3] Create Aperture UI components (email list, detail view, attachment viewer) in vanilla JS
[Phase 4] Integrate Aperture module into VIPER's moduleConfig and add settings toggle
[Phase 5] Test multi-source .mbox uploads and verify case-scoped data isolation
[Phase 5] Polish UI/UX with VIPER aesthetics and perform final testing
